meta.editInstructions: Single source for credentials and cover. PUBLIC-SAFETY RULE: values containing PLACEHOLDER are never rendered - a pending credential is simply invisible on the site. To publish: (1) set registration.number and accreditations[].body/reference to FDH-verified values; (2) once FDH confirms the final scheme roster, set medicalAidsProvisional to false - until then NO scheme names are shown publicly, only a 'we confirm when you book' line.
